hero.name: Mohamed Magdy Elkomy
hero.intro: I craft refined, performant web experiences with React.js. Currently building production apps at <1>{{company}}</1> in Cairo — when I'm not behind a camera or pulling shots from my home espresso setup.

stats.title: By the numbers
stats.subtitle: A snapshot of where I am today

about.title: Engineering meets craft
about.p1: Hi, I'm Mohamed Magdy — most people call me Mo. I graduated from MTI in 2024 with a degree in Computer Science and AI, after exploring everything from embedded systems at ITI to machine learning at Zewail City.
about.p2: Front-end is where I found my home — where engineering meets craft, and where the work reaches real people every day. I care about clean code, smooth interactions, and the small details that make a product feel <1>{{premium}}</1>.
about.p3: Outside of code, I'm probably behind a camera or pulling shots from my MaxxPresso. The same care that goes into a well-framed photograph or a well-pulled espresso belongs in software too.
